name: Nathan Heaps
observations: Experience in devops, web engineering, agentic engineering
Preference: Never link to documentation that doesn't exist yet - create it first or use TODO comments instead (rule: .claude/rules/documentation-linking.md)
Has a separate Claude Code configuration repository at https://github.com/nsheaps/.claude.git which can be synced locally via the remote-config plugin
Uses the ai-mktpl repo (nsheaps/ai-mktpl) as the official marketplace for Claude Code plugins

name: TOON
observations: Token-Oriented Object Notation - compact serialization format for LLM contexts
API: encode(obj) to serialize, decode(str) to parse
Uses YAML-like indentation for nested objects, CSV-style tabular layout for uniform arrays
Example tabular array format: users[3]{id,name,role}: followed by comma-separated rows

name: data-serialization-plugin
observations: Supports YAML, JSON, TOON, XML, HTML format conversions
Special handling for Playwright accessibility snapshots
Dependencies installed to .deps/ directory with PYTHONPATH setup

name: nsheaps/.ai claude-code-review workflow
observations: Uses interpolate-prompt action for env var substitution

name: stainless-api/stainless claude-code-review workflow
observations: PR #15127 contains improvements that were pulled into nsheaps/.ai
Either workflow may be newer than the other at any given time

name: mise plugin
observations: Auto-installs mise to $project/bin/.local on CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE web sessions
Has comprehensive SKILL.md for mise workflows
Configurable via plugins.settings.yaml (enabled, install_to_project, background_install, version, auto_install_tools, auto_trust)

name: gh-tool plugin
observations: Auto-installs GitHub CLI to $project/bin/.local on CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE web sessions
Has comprehensive SKILL.md for gh workflows (PRs, issues, releases, API, actions)
Configurable via plugins.settings.yaml (enabled, install_to_project, background_install, version, auto_auth_check)

name: permissions-sync plugin
observations: Merges permission scopes from configurable source settings.json files into settings.local.json
Supports GitHub repo sources (github:owner/repo:path) and local file sources
Uses union or replace merge strategy
Configurable target: project or user level settings.local.json

name: nsheaps/cept
observations: Description: Share your ideas and con-cept-ions with the world
Uses nsheaps-ai-mktpl marketplace via GitHub source
Has extensive Bash command permissions (git, gh, bun, npm, node, etc.)
